infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to take photos of items you want to track.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select photos of items you want to track.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save photos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Find My Stuff to access your camera to take photos of items.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Find My Stuff to access your photos to select images of items.
